items.title: Palakkad-Kozhikode highway construction to get under way soon
items.summary: Six-lane highway under the Union government’s Bharatmala project is back on track, with over 95% of land acquisition completed

items.title: Live Updates: Cease-Fire Unraveling as U.S. and Iran Trade Strikes Again
items.summary: A fresh round of attacks by the U.S. on Sunday was the latest volley in a familiar pattern of back-and-forth strikes fueled by disputes over the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: Reform would have received a fraction of £26.7m donations haul under a £100,000 cap, analysis shows
items.summary: Exclusive: Party’s average registered donation was £137, 496 last year, almost six times that of Labour or Tories Reform UK would have held just 15% of the donations it received...
